visual_description: A man in a light-colored shirt and tie sits in an office chair, looking forward with a neutral expression. A hand reaches toward a blood-stained mobile phone encased in plastic, alongside a wallet and other items on a desk. The scene is dimly lit, with blinds visible in the background.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone with a moderate pace and pitch, accompanied by a subtle background hum.
